channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: T. rex took 40 years to reach full size, scientists find
item.description: Tyrannosaurus rex may have been a much slower grower than scientists realized. A new study of 17 tyrannosaur fossils found that the giant predator lik...

item.title: Scientists discover neurons must break their DNA to build the brain
item.description: As newborn neurons make their way through the developing brain, they must squeeze through incredibly tight spaces to reach their final destinations. R...

item.title: Scientists say human anatomy still holds undiscovered secrets
item.description: Even after centuries of study, researchers continue to find new details and overlooked structures within the human body.

item.title: Brown lakes favor pike and walleye over trout and bass
item.description: Freshwater lakes across North America and Europe are turning browner, reducing visibility and reshaping fish populations.
